content.en:
Endless Realms Alliance.

Ye Tian is back.

"This harvest is good, not only has I obtained the Tianyan Roulette, but also obtained a variety of Eternal Realm Treasures, and I have also obtained a lot of various resources!"

Ye Tian said with satisfaction.

I have to say that the Eternal Realm God Realm junior powerhouse named Qin Xuan was indeed too good, and he sent him so many treasures.

If there are a few more Eternal Realm God Realms who die like this, he won't mind.

......

After coming back, Ye Tian was ready to deduce and perfect the method of the Xuan Star Realm Snake and perfect it to the level of the perfect realm spirit.

Once he perfected it, he could completely re-cultivate.

After all, as long as he copied the body before he had not condensed the Spirit of the Xuan Star Realm Snake Realm, he could re-cultivate, and when the time came, he could replace all of them, but it would not affect anything if he delayed his cultivation for a period of time. "Six-Zero-Seven"

Subsequently.

Ye Tian began to use the Tianyan Roulette Wheel to deduce and improve the method of the Xuan Star Realm Snake, once the deduction was successful, it would no longer be the method of the Xuan Star Realm Snake, and he could even spread the word to his family and let them cultivate.

After all, the method of the realm spirit deduced belongs to him completely, and he is the source, which is naturally passed on to anyone.

Of course.

If you don't have a little accumulation, it will be very difficult to deduce.

However, he had obtained three high-grade realm spirit inheritances, and he could also browse some other ordinary realm spirit inheritances in the library of the Xuanxing Holy Gate.

Therefore, he now has a deep understanding of the realm spirit, and if he uses the Tianyan Roulette to deduce, the success rate will be very high.

As Ye Tian's Eternal Dao Seed continued to be consumed, the deduction continued.

However, it is extremely difficult to deduce the perfect Eternal Realm Spirit.

The years passed.

One of Ye Tian's replica bodies was scrapped, but Ye Tian was still deducing, and every deduction had a harvest, so he kept persisting.

Before you know it, the billion-billion-time solstice era has passed.

this day.

Ye Tian finally succeeded in deducing a perfect Eternal Realm Spirit Method, although it was a combination of multiple Eternal Realm Spirit Inheritances and based on the Xuan Star Realm Snake, in fact, it had undergone a fundamental change.

After all, if you don't change your essence, you can't reach the level of perfection.

Now, this method of perfecting the Eternal Realm Spirit is no longer suitable to be called the Xuan Star Realm Snake.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian named it the Heavenly Yan Realm Snake Technique, and named this perfect-level Eternal Realm Spirit Method.

Subsequently, he copied the body that had not yet condensed the realm spirit, and began to cultivate the condensed heavenly realm snake spirit again.

So, he began to practice the Heavenly Snake Realm Snake Technique, condensing the Heavenly Evolution Realm Snake Realm Spirit.

Time passes slowly.

After a long time, Ye Tian had successfully cultivated the Heavenly Yan Realm Snake Realm Spirit, and at this time, his Eternal Dao Seed was very weak.

However, after he used the Chilin Ancient Spear to refine and improve his Eternal Dao Seed, coupled with refining various resources, he gradually recovered.

At the same time, his Heavenly Evolution Realm Snake Realm Spirit also gave birth to a powerful Eternal Realm Spiritual Technique, the Heavenly Evolution Scale Armor Technique, which was a perfect-level Eternal Realm Spiritual Technique that surpassed the Xuanxing Scale Armor Technique.

After the Eternal Dao Seed had completely recovered, Ye Tian tested the improvement of the Heavenly Yan Realm Snake Realm Spirit on himself, and he found that he had increased at least three times.

In other words, the Heavenly Yan Realm Snake Technique is about three times more powerful than the Xuan Star Realm Snake Technique, which is the strength of the Perfect-level Eternal Realm Spirit Inheritance.

"It is worthy of being a perfect-level Eternal Realm Spirit, if every Eternal Realm Spirit is a Perfect-level Eternal Realm Spirit, then my future strength will be extremely terrifying!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He estimated that his current strength was already stronger than the original Demon Seed Gu Dusk, and if he went to break through the fifth round of assessment of the Xuan Star Holy Gate, he would definitely be able to easily break through without paying such a big price.

Subsequently.

Afterwards.

Ye Tian was ready to continue to deduce the perfect-level Eternal Realm Spirit, but this time it was with the Xuanxing Gu Peng Realm Spirit as the core to deduce and improve.

And he is also working hard to improve the Eternal Dao Seed, striving to raise the Eternal Dao Seed to the current limit as soon as possible.

However, due to the fact that I had to do it again, I delayed my practice for a period of time and wasted a lot of time, but it was worth it.

In the following years, Ye Tian had been using the Chilin Ancient Spear to refine his Eternal Dao Species, and he was also looking for more Eternal Demon Pillars.

If there are a large number of Eternal Pillars, it can also produce a qualitative improvement effect........

In this way, before I knew it, more than a billion years had passed.

On this day, Ye Tian successfully deduced and perfected the second perfect-level Eternal Realm Spirit Method.

He successfully perfected the Xuanxing Gu Peng Realm Spirit Method to the perfect level, and renamed it the Tianyan Gu Peng Technique.

After he raised the Eternal Dao Seed to the current limit, he could cultivate the Tianyan Gu Peng Technique and condense the Tianyan Gu Peng Realm Spirit.

However, this day will take a long time, at least 20 billion years to the Dao era.

After all, the cultivation in the back is getting more and more difficult, and the time it takes will naturally take longer.

This is only to impact the second Eternal Realm Spirit, and when the third Eternal Realm Spirit is impacted, it will take longer and be more difficult.

......

Nine Dust Realm Alliance.

this day.

A copy of Ye Tian's body sneaked here, he was going to enter the abyss of the demon seed of this eternal realm to take a look, his purpose was to find the eternal demon pillar, so one by one the eternal kingdoms went to find it, and he never gave up this plan.

When entering a demon seed abyss of the Nine Dust Realm Alliance, Ye Tian sensed a demon seed of the Eternal Realm God Realm, and there was an Eternal Demon Pillar here, and this Eternal Realm God Realm Demon Seed was still refining the Eternal Demon Pillar, but had not completely refined it.

As long as it can't be refined to a certain extent, it can't take the Eternal Demon Pillar from the Demon Seed Abyss. 5.3

Ye Tian sneaked into the past, directly attacked with all his strength, instantly killed this Eternal Realm God Realm demon seed, and then replaced the other party to refine here.

With his efficiency, coupled with the fact that he did not hesitate to consume the Eternal Dao Seed to urge the Eternal Demon Pillar Technique, it would not take too long for the Eternal Demon Pillar to be completely refined.

Sure enough, after a long period of time, Ye Tian successfully refined the Eternal Demon Pillar.

He then sent a replica body to bring back the Pillar of Eternity, while he continued to explore the other Eternal Realm Alliances that he had not visited.

After some time, the Eternal Pillar was sent to the Endless Realm Alliance.

This time, Ye Tian did not give the Eternal Demon Pillar to his relatives, but used it himself.

The Eternal Demon Pillar and the Chilin Ancient Spear have a better effect, and the efficiency of refining the Eternal Dao Seed is faster.
